aggregated_observations_prices_check.name: aggregated_observations_prices_check
aggregated_observations_prices_check.value: "aggregated_observations"."cheapest_price" >= 0 and ("aggregated_observations"."nth_price" is null or "aggregated_observations"."nth_price" >= 0) and ("aggregated_observations"."median_top_n_price" is null or "aggregated_observations"."median_top_n_price" >= 0)

recipe_evaluations_prices_check.name: recipe_evaluations_prices_check
recipe_evaluations_prices_check.value: ("recipe_evaluations"."expected_craft_cost" is null or "recipe_evaluations"."expected_craft_cost" >= 0) and ("recipe_evaluations"."estimated_sale_price" is null or "recipe_evaluations"."estimated_sale_price" >= 0)

refresh_cycles_counts_check.name: refresh_cycles_counts_check
refresh_cycles_counts_check.value: "refresh_cycles"."total_recipes" >= 0 and "refresh_cycles"."total_queries" >= 0 and "refresh_cycles"."completed_queries" >= 0 and "refresh_cycles"."completed_recipes" >= 0 and "refresh_cycles"."failed_queries" >= 0 and "refresh_cycles"."failed_recipes" >= 0 and "refresh_cycles"."completed_queries" + "refresh_cycles"."failed_queries" <= "refresh_cycles"."total_queries" and "refresh_cycles"."completed_recipes" + "refresh_cycles"."failed_recipes" <= "refresh_cycles"."total_recipes"
